title: Senior Software Engineer - Apollo Telehealth Capital India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Apollo Telehealth Capital India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
